title: Main by Waldnetworks
description: Explore a vast world with enhanced shaders, Xerox worldmap and many more. Perfect for both solo and multiplayer, this modpack offers endless customization and thrilling challenges. Embark on your journey now!
body:
The **"Main"** modpack is designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by optimizing performance, improving user-friendliness, and enriching gameplay without losing the charm of the vanilla atmosphere. It was specifically developed to provide a smoother, more seamless, and enjoyable gameplay experience, whether you're playing solo or in multiplayer. With a selection of carefully chosen mods, you'll benefit from improved performance, more intuitive controls, immersive world-building, and enhanced communication.

### **Key Features:**

#### **Optimized Performance:**

* Mods like **Sodium** and **Lithium** significantly boost your game's performance. These mods reduce lag and improve framerate, ensuring a smoother Minecraft experience – even on lower-end systems. Thanks to these performance enhancements, the game runs more fluidly, even with larger builds or more complex worlds.

#### **Information That Makes a Difference:**

* **BetterF3** offers an enhanced version of the default F3 display, giving you more useful data about your game environment, such as your coordinates, FPS, and system load.
* **BetterStats** provides detailed statistics on your progress in the game, from collected resources to achievements, allowing you to easily track your in-game journey.

#### **Customizable Controls and Crafting:**

* **Controlling** makes remapping and assigning keybinds easier and more intuitive, allowing you to adjust the controls to suit your preferences.
* **CraftingTweaks** makes crafting more efficient and faster by enabling customizable crafting shortcuts, saving you time and making the process smoother.

#### **Immersive World and Atmosphere:**

* **AmbientSounds** adds a variety of environmental sounds that make the world feel more alive and realistic, from the wind rustling through trees to animal noises in the distance.
* **Dynamic FPS** helps stabilize your framerate without sacrificing visual quality, even when exploring large, open areas or engaging in action-heavy scenarios.

#### **Enhanced Gameplay Mechanics:**

* **AppleSkin** shows exactly how much hunger you have left and how much nourishment a particular food item provides. This helps you manage your resources better and stay alive longer without wasting food.
* **Auto Switch** automatically swaps between the appropriate tools based on the task you're performing – whether it's mining blocks or fighting mobs. This saves you valuable time and effort.

#### **Improved Multiplayer Communication:**

* **Voice Chat** allows seamless voice communication with other players, enabling direct conversations with your team or fellow players without the need for external voice platforms.
* **Chat Heads** displays chat messages in the form of floating heads above players, so you can always know who is talking and what is being said, without having to open the chat window constantly.

#### **Enhanced Exploration and Navigation:**

* **Xaero’s Minimap** and **Xaero’s World Map** provide you with detailed, user-friendly maps to help you navigate and explore the world easily. You’ll never lose your way on your adventures.


**Why Download This Modpack?**

If you're looking to elevate your Minecraft experience, **"Main"** is the perfect choice. It enhances your gameplay across multiple areas, from smoother performance to more intuitive controls and immersive world-building. Whether you're playing solo or with friends, **"Main"** makes Minecraft feel more fluid, responsive, and enjoyable. Download it now and experience Minecraft like never before!
